mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fund_nav_history (fund_code, nav_date, unit_nav, accumulated_nav, daily_growth_rate, source_as_of, fetched_at) VALUES
(#{p.fundCode}, #{p.navDate}, #{p.unitNav}, #{p.accumulatedNav}, #{p.dailyGrowthRate}, #{p.sourceAsOf}, #{p.fetchedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE unit_nav=VALUES(unit_nav), accumulated_nav=VALUES(accumulated_nav), daily_growth_rate=VALUES(daily_growth_rate), source_as_of=VALUES(source_as_of), fetched_at=VALUES(fetched_at), update_time=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_price_bar (stock_code, market, granularity, bar_time, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, currency, source_as_of, fetched_at) VALUES
(#{b.stockCode}, #{b.market}, #{b.granularity}, #{b.barTime}, #{b.open}, #{b.high}, #{b.low}, #{b.close}, #{b.volume}, #{b.currency}, #{b.sourceAsOf}, #{b.fetchedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open_price=VALUES(open_price), high_price=VALUES(high_price), low_price=VALUES(low_price), close_price=VALUES(close_price), volume=VALUES(volume), currency=VALUES(currency), source_as_of=VALUES(source_as_of), fetched_at=VALUES(fetched_at), update_time=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_company_profile (stock_code, market, company_name, industry, business_summary, company_profile, website, source_as_of, fetched_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{market}, #{companyName}, #{industry}, #{businessSummary}, #{companyProfile}, #{website}, #{sourceAsOf}, #{fetchedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE company_name=VALUES(company_name), industry=VALUES(industry), business_summary=VALUES(business_summary), company_profile=VALUES(company_profile), website=VALUES(website), source_as_of=VALUES(source_as_of), fetched_at=VALUES(fetched_at), update_time=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(nav_date) FROM fund_nav_history WHERE fund_code=#{fundCode}
SELECT MAX(bar_time) FROM stock_price_bar WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode} AND market=#{market} AND granularity=#{granularity}
SELECT * FROM stock_company_profile WHERE stock_code=#{stockCode} AND market=#{market} LIMIT 1
